description: Memorial list of persons from different families mentioning the judges Shabbat and Efrayim and the latter's son Yehuda "the distinguished member of the ḥavura." (Information from Goitein's index card.) There is unrelated text in Judaeo-Arabic on verso in a different hand, possibly legal jottings.
description_he: רשימת אזכרה של אנשים ממשפחות שונות המזכירה את השופטים שבת ואפרים ואת בנו יהודה
